calendar.matters:
Petition For Payment If G. Gornostajevs' Attotneys From Estate Assets.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi and Irene Barrese for Georgijs Gornstajevs. Giulio Accornero for Andrej Gornostajers and Galina Emelina.

Discussions were held with regards to the Petition for Final distribution and waiver of final accounting, attorneys fees, and the Petition for Entitlement. The Declaration of M.B. Bassi filed on May 28, 2013 was received into evidence and no objection was made to Mr. Bassi's request for judicial notice. Mr. Accornero presented oral argument to support his position on the validity of his client claim of heir ship. Mr. Bassi stated that his client had no knowledge about the other heirs and gave an explanation as to services provided by him and Ms. Barresse and the application of the common fund theory. Mr. Accornero reported the only objection he has is to when his clients came into the case. The Court questioned if the service provided was extraordinary fees and Mr. Bassi asked to have the fees approved Nunc Pro Tunc. The Petition for Payment of G. Gornostajevs' attorney from Estate Assets, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Brenda L. Crown (Csr #: 10503. Telephone #: (916) 872-7488). Clerk: Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition To Determine Those Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar May-16-2013 Vacated

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2013 Continued To Jun-12-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Bassi and Irene Barrese for Nadzeda Shebalin. Giulio Accornero for Andrej Gornostajevs and Galina Emelina.

The Court stated that a Petition to Determine Heirship is required. Mr. Bassi stated that they are working dilligently to try and resolve their differences, that they could not resolve the issue of the common fund theory and that all Parties have been noticed. Mr. Accornero asked that the Heirs be determined and the Estate be distributed, stated that he can file a Petition for Determination of Heirship, and that he thinks they can get all their ducks in a row and get everything done. The Court also stated that the issue of notice and payment of the filing fee on Ms. Baresse's accounting petition is to be determined by the Court. Mr. Bassi and Mr. Accornero both waived notice of the accounting on behalf of their Clients. The May 17, 2013 trial date is vacated. Waiver of account/final distribution was continued to June 12, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Accornero's petition is to be given a hearing date of June 12, 2013.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Continued To Mar-26-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Michael Bassi and Irene Barrese for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Giulio Accorner for Objectors/Beneficiaries.

Mr. Bassi stated that they are working on something acceptable to both sides and that his client wants to go to trial and that he requested to set the matter for a short cause trial on the common fund theory. Discussion were held with regard to an updated accounting, fees and time for discovery if trial date is set. The Court noted that the Accounting filed on September 4, 2012 did not ask for approval and that if they are seeking for court approval of the accounting, they must file a Petition for Approval of Accounting. The matter was continued to March 26, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Status Conference and Trial Date is set on May 17, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Petition for Approval of Accounting (to be filed) is set for hearing on May 17, 2013 at 9 a.m.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Abasse.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2013 Continued To Feb-19-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-14-2012 Continued To Jan-15-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Barrese for Administrator.

Counsel reported that parties have stipulated to continue for 60 days. The matter was continued to January 15, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Continued To Nov-14-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Irene Barrese for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Michael Bassi for Georgijs Gornostajevs. Giulio Accornero for Andrej Gornostajevs and Galina Emelina.

Counsel requested a continuance stating that they were still in the process of obtaining documents. The accounting petition was continued to November 14, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bassi stated that he will bring a Motion for Payment of Attorney Fees based on the common fund theory as soon as he can.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-11-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Giulio Accornero for Adrej Gornostajevs and Galina Emelina. Irene Barrese for Georgis Gornostajevs. Michael Bassi for Georgis Gornostajevs and Nadezda Shebalin.

Counsel presented oral argument with regard to who holds the burden of proof and who the Heirs are. The accounting petition was continued to September 5, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to produce documents and any authority for those documents to be considered admissible.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Santiago.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Continued To Jul-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
